LangGeneral.byakko_mod_doggo_hint_far.te: You faintly sensed the prey's presence.
LangGeneral.byakko_mod_doggo_hint_toofar: The prey is not around here.
LangGeneral.byakko_mod_nefia_rescue_reve: It appears the hostage is there.
LangGeneral.byakko_mod_progress_sales.te:
Attach sales tag to merchandise 
and record #2orens in sales (#1 / #2)
LangGeneral.byakko_mod_progress_sales_st:
Attach sales tag to stolen goods 
and record #2orens in sales (#1 / #2)
LangGeneral.byakko_mod_progress_shipping: Ship from your settlement and earn orens (#1 / #2)
LangGeneral.byakko_mod_progress_slaver.t:
Attach sales tag to slave
and record #2orens in sales (#1 / #2)
LangGeneral.byakko_mod_progress_stronger: Hunt hostile creatures: #1 of #2 (Only Nefia with Lv.#3 or more)
Hmm…? Apparently, the hostage managed to return on their own.
SourceChara.liaisonfg.name: *r
SourceChara.liaisonmg.name: *r
SourceChara.liaisontg.name: *r
SourceChara.liaisonwg.name: *r
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_common_duel.detai:
Oh no! Some adventurer of unknown origin is trying to challenge you! Of course you're going to accept, right? I just got dragged into this, but I'm holding onto #1 as your reward. 
I can't say this too loudly, but the truth is, a vicious adventurer is trying to kill me. At this rate, I won’t be able to sleep soundly at night! Please, take them out for me! 
My close [qFriend] was terribly mistreated by that bastard of an adventurer! I want revenge before they can’t be found! I’ll give you #1—please, beat them up for me! I’m begging you!
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_common_duel.name:
Here comes new challengers!
SAVE me!
Unforgivens
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_common_dungeon_at:
You know the master who dwells in Nefia, right? It usually doesn't come out from the depths of Nefia, but if it does, things will surely become terrible. Could you go and defeat it before that happens? 
Even the guards are having a hard time with the master of Nefia. I don't care where — could you go and defeat it for me instead? Of course I'll reward you.
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_common_dungeon_re:
My [qFriend] has been trapped in a Nefia! I want to rescue them as soon as possible, but the guards are just standing around doing nothing. I've prepared #1 and #2 as a reward, so please save [qFriend] in place of those useless fools! I'm begging you!
My [qFriend] left saying, “I'm going to strike it rich in the Nefia,” and hasn't come back since. I'm worried they may have gotten captured in there. I'll give you #1 and #2 as a reward if you can bring them back safely. I'll tell you where to find them.

What a disaster! The family heirloom #2 that's been passed down in my house has been stolen! What's worse, the culprit is hiding in the nearby Nefia, and the guards are at their wits' end! Please, get it back for me!
I heard a rumor that the master of Nefia possesses a powerful #2. It might be dubious, but if it's true it would be amazing! If you bring it to me, I'll give you #1 as a reward.

Stolen relic
Price of a rumor
Wild animals near the town have been ravaging the crops in my fields night after night! At this rate, the vegetables I've worked so hard to grow will be ruined. Please go and get rid of as many of them as you can! 
Year after year, wild animals destroying crops are a constant headache for farmers. I'll pay a reward—would you help me cull them?
While I looked away for just a moment, wild animals ate my crops! They might not mean any harm, but I can't let them treat my field as their feeding ground. Please teach those pests a lesson.

Grudge over food
Hunting season
Eat or be eaten
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_common_good_furni:
Are you good at crafting? I want to prepare #1 as a gift for an important [qFriend], but if possible, I want it to be something special. Please make a #1 of #2 and #3. 
Recently, [qFriend] of mine bragged about having a rare #1. It’s frustrating! I really want a #1 like that too! So, please make a #1 of #2 and #3 and bring it to me.
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_common_oishinbo.d:
Listen to me! The other day I went to a restaurant, but the #1 I ordered tasted like a failed dish and was inedible! You can make the real thing that I’ll be satisfied with, right? So, bring me the #1 of #2 and #3.
I call myself a gourmet, but I’ve already eaten everything in this world that’s said to be delicious. However, the #1 of #2 and #3 would surely satisfy even my refined palate. Could you make it for me? I can’t wait any longer! Hurry and bring it out!
I’m getting tired of the taste of ordinary dishes. Sometimes I want to try some innovative creative cuisine. That’s right, you should make it. Please prepare the #1 of #2 and #3.
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_common_oishinbo.n:
Ultimate menu
Gourmet seeker
Potential of fusion cuisine
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_common_urban_boss:
#aka, help me! It's a monster! A pack of monsters has come right near the town, and we don't stand a chance against them! At this point we have no choice but to ask you. We'll offer #1 as payment—please defeat them!
The town is facing a crisis. According to scouts, evolved monsters will soon come to the town. Their numbers are small, but each one is extremely powerful. Cooperate with the unit to drive them off. I have #1 ready to hire you.
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_common_urban_intr:
We're in trouble. Lately, packs of monsters have been breaking into the town and causing damage. What's worse, they always seem to strike when the guards aren't on alert! I'll evacuate everyone—please intercept them and fight them off in the town!
#aka, we want to hire your skills. Actually, there’s a plan to take down a pack of monsters just outside the town by engaging them in the streets. We’ll lure the monsters — we want you to handle the actual extermination. We’ve prepared #1 as payment; is that enough?
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_fighter_due:
A newcomer’s joined the guild — a rather promising one. Give them some training yourself. Don’t worry if you injure them a little; “no pain, no gain,” right?
I’m actually raising the rookie. They’ve got talent and skill, but they’re inexperienced and still a bit rough around the edges. There’s something to be learned from defeat. I’ll set up a mock battle, so go beat every one of them.

Training for newbies
To experience defeat
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_fighter_dun:
The guild is running a “Let’s Clear a Nefia” campaign. It’s simple — just clear one Nefia anywhere you like. Why not join?
We’ve received a request from the settlers of Misiria. They’d like Nefias suppressed to increase the number of safe settlement candidates, even if only a little. Clear any Nefia you can find; once you defeat the boss the lesser enemies will scatter on their own.
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_fighter_gui:
A faction of the Mage Guild, who boast that "knowledge is stronger than power," has picked a fight with us. I’m not quite sure why, but there’s no way we’d lose to such bookworms who seem completely lacking in common sense. #aka, beat them up thoroughly.
To gain experience in battles against magic, we regularly hold mock battles with the Mage Guild. Since they’re just mock battles, nothing happens if we lose, but we want to maintain the guild’s honor. #aka, won’t you join us as backup?

It's all academic
Guild mock battle
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_fighter_hun:
You know about the citizens’ efforts to maintain public order, right? The parts they can’t handle get passed on to the guild like this. This time’s quota is about #3 monsters.
There’s a monster-slaying request. Your quota this time is to defeat #3 monsters of any kind. It may be too easy, but think of it as light exercise.

The reason jobs keep being sent to the guild like this is because our fighting power is trusted. We want to show we can handle tougher requests — go to a Nefia of danger level #3 or higher and defeat #2 monsters.
The guild regularly holds trials in Nefias to match requests to each person's ability. Show off your skill by defeating #2 monsters in a danger level #3 or higher Nefia. It’s not unpaid — there’s a small reward waiting for you.

Show of force
Testing in Nefia

The adventurers have gone on strike against killing Yeeks again! Naturally, the burden falls on us. The quota is, of course, the same as before—#3.
You might be fed up, but there’s another Yeek-slaying quota. It’s #3 again. No complaints accepted.
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_fighter_sub:
Apparently monsters are breeding in large numbers at a certain location, and the guild has received a request to wipe them out. It's just a routine job as usual—someone please take it.
I don't really want to tell you this, but there's a fairly dangerous job that doesn't pay off. It's a monster-hunting request from the town. Nobody wants to take it, so the guild has decided to add a little extra reward—interested?

Usual monster hunting
A thankless job
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_fighter_war:
This is a request from the Palmia Army. The army is conducting an operation to clear out a monster nest, and our role is to destroy or hold back any stragglers they miss. It’s a dangerous assignment — will you take it?
What a disaster — the guild’s monster-hunting operation has failed, and at this rate the guild members won’t be able to withdraw from the nest! Head to the site immediately and wreak havoc on anything in your way until the guild members have finished retreating. It may be difficult, but please — I’m counting on you!
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_liaison_fig:
Have you ever heard of werewolves? They disguise themselves as humans, blend in with ordinary people, and commit murders without anyone noticing. I've actually been hired to hunt one down. I've received information that there's one in this town, but I still haven't managed to find it. I'll pay you #1 if you help me take it down. 
Have you heard about the sudden increase in murders around this town? The guild has been asked to assist with the investigation, and we're currently planning to set up a stakeout. Once the case is solved, there'll be #1 reward. Would you be willing to help us?

Werewolf Hunt 
When the Imposter is sus

The guild is running a “Let’s Clear a Nefia” campaign. It’s simple — just clear one Nefia anywhere you like. Why not join?
We’ve received a request from the settlers of Misiria. They’d like Nefias suppressed to increase the number of safe settlement candidates, even if only a little. Clear any Nefia you can find; once you defeat the boss the lesser enemies will scatter on their own.

You know about the citizens’ efforts to maintain public order, right? The parts they can’t handle get passed on to the guild like this. This time’s quota is about #3 monsters.
There’s a monster-slaying request. Your quota this time is to defeat #3 monsters of any kind. It may be too easy, but think of it as light exercise.

Apparently monsters are breeding in large numbers at a certain location, and the guild has received a request to wipe them out. It's just a routine job as usual—someone please take it.
I don't really want to tell you this, but there's a fairly dangerous job that doesn't pay off. It's a monster-hunting request from the town. Nobody wants to take it, so the guild has decided to add a little extra reward—interested?

Usual monster hunting
A thankless job

Cut Quest. No need to translate or filter.
Cut Quest. No need to translate or filter.

モンスター退治の専門家
モンスター退治の専門家
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_liaison_mer:
There’s a fool here who got left behind by the caravan. I haven’t asked why, but it’d be pitiful to just leave him here—please escort him to #3.
A guild apprentice was supposed to go to #3, but he got lost and came back. Please guide him there.

One of my colleagues has been doing business with a certain individual until recently, but I've learned that the person is surrounded by all sorts of shady rumors. Some even say they dispose of people once they've outlived their usefulness. Could you escort my colleague to #3 before it's too late?
One of our guild members apparently got into a violent altercation with a business partner, and now there are even people hunting them down. I'm looking for someone who can escort them safely back to #3. Would you be willing to take the job? I'm hopeless in a fight, but you're more than capable of handling yourself, aren't you?

Witnessed too much
Journey of escape

Do you like handing out flyers? No—you do. Of course you do. So go hand out #2 of them. See, they’re already prepared right here.
A merchant can’t just buy and sell goods. Advertising is important too. I’ll prepare the flyers—you go hand out #2 of them.

I've got an important meeting with the [qClient] coming up, and I'm worried they'll look down on me if my place is filled with nothing but ordinary furniture. So, I'd like to get something more luxurious. A high-end bed should do nicely.
I'm thinking of giving a #1 to the [qClient] as a gesture of goodwill, but the problem is they're famous for being incredibly picky. An ordinary one probably won't satisfy them. Could you make a #1 of #2 and #3 worthy of their standards and bring it to me?

Put on a show
Commitment to furniture

Are you knowledgeable about investing? Me? Not at all—I invest purely by intuition. So, for reference, go make #2 times investments wherever you think is best.
If there’s a business you want to grow, investment is the way to go. The guild is currently encouraging active investment as part of its growth week. Just #2 times, why don’t you give it a try?
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_mage_duel.d:
Lately a radical faction that proclaims things like “research that’s useless in real” and “only fund truly useful research” has been causing trouble repeatedly. It’s frustrating—though their ability is strong, we can’t let them cause any more problems. Go show them what real is.
Are you interested in magical dueling? The Mage Guild’s Duel Division trains in practical defensive techniques and is looking for opponents. Want to try a match?
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_mage_dungeo:
Do you know about the magical #2 sleeping in the Nefia? It seems to be guarded by the Nefia's lord, but I badly want it. I'll reward you—defeat it and bring it back for me.
According to divination, there's a powerful #2 in the Nefia. I want to go fetch it myself, but I'm not good at fighting. Please get it for me.

Legendary magic item
I saw it...!?
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_mage_guild_:
We received a threatening letter from the Thieves' Guild saying they'll soon come to steal something valuable from the guild. Seriously—what a joke! Kill every last one of them. Their deaths will be our answer to the blackmail letter.
Did you know there’s been a string of thefts in Lumiest City? It’s the work of the Thieves’ Guild. According to reliable sources, the next target seems to be around here. #aka, protect the guild.
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_mage_harves:
I understand it's essential for the experiment, but I’ve grown rather weary of the gathering myself. Would you harvest #2 of the herbs I planted in the field in my stead? I know it’s the sort of task suited for an apprentice, but would you mind taking it on? 
It’s about time to harvest the herbs I planted in the laboratory garden. Doing it alone would be quite the task, so lend me a hand, will you? Your share will be about #2 by weight.
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_mage_liaiso:
I have a library building that has been left abandoned for quite some time, and before I knew it, it had become a hideout for a bunch of troublemakers. I plan to deal with the building later, but before that, could you retrieve about #2 books that are still in good condition? 
Some idiot was practicing summoning magic in the library and ended up failing. I wouldn't care so much, but the monster they summoned has been tearing through the books. Before everything gets ruined, I need you to recover #2 books for me.

Organizing Collection
Rampage of the Imps

Do you know about the magical #2 sleeping in the Nefia? It seems to be guarded by the Nefia's lord, but I badly want it. I'll reward you—defeat it and bring it back for me.
According to divination, there's a powerful #2 in the Nefia. I want to go fetch it myself, but I'm not good at fighting. Please get it for me.

Legendary magic item
I saw it...!?

I understand it's essential for the experiment, but I’ve grown rather weary of the gathering myself. Would you harvest #2 of the herbs I planted in the field in my stead? I know it’s the sort of task suited for an apprentice, but would you mind taking it on? 
It’s about time to harvest the herbs I planted in the laboratory garden. Doing it alone would be quite the task, so lend me a hand, will you? Your share will be about #2 by weight.

One shouldn't promise things lightly. A certain noble commissioned a #2 and #3 #1, but after thinking it over I realized I can't make it. I don't want to lose that connection—make it for me to save my reputation.
I've run out of the medicine needed for my research. I normally make it myself, but I'm tied up—please make a #2 and #3 #1 for me.

Subcontracting from the noble
Laboratory medications
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_mage_potion:
One shouldn't promise things lightly. A certain noble commissioned a #2 and #3 #1, but after thinking it over I realized I can't make it. I don't want to lose that connection—make it for me to save my reputation.
I've run out of the medicine needed for my research. I normally make it myself, but I'm tied up—please make a #2 and #3 #1 for me.

Subcontracting from the noble
Laboratory medications
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_mage_subdue:
Those idiots from the Warriors' Guild abandoned the ghost hunt and ran off. Now we have to clean up their mess — take care of it.
Apparently something strange happened in the town's concert hall; it's swarming with ghosts. Purge them by force. You afraid of no ghosts, ain't you?
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_merchant_de:
I had promised to deliver #2 to [qClient] who lives in #3, but the procurement was delayed, and it looks like I won’t make it in time on foot. Use a return spell, a teleporter, or whatever you need—just hurry and take it to him.
Damn it, my [qClient] in #3 asked me for #2, but it seems I delivered less than he requested. Take the additional amount to him immediately.
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_merchant_es:
There’s a fool here who got left behind by the caravan. I haven’t asked why, but it’d be pitiful to just leave him here—please escort him to #3.
A guild apprentice was supposed to go to #3, but he got lost and came back. Please guide him there.
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_merchant_fl:
Do you like handing out flyers? No—you do. Of course you do. So go hand out #2 of them. See, they’re already prepared right here.
A merchant can’t just buy and sell goods. Advertising is important too. I’ll prepare the flyers—you go hand out #2 of them.
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_merchant_gu:
This is serious! The Thieves’ Guild has sent word they’ll be breaking in here to steal from us today! To go so far as to announce it—how dare they take us for granted. #aka, don’t hold back. Crush them all. 
Those thieves from the Thieves' Guild—if only they kept to themselves quietly in the shadows of society. But, to think, they’re actually planning a robbery here. We're evacuating, so, #aka, go undercover inside the guild and smash them so they can never come out again. Please!
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_merchant_hu:
The road is something everyone uses—and what everyone uses must be safe, right? Defeat about #3 monsters and protect the road.
It might not exactly be the guild’s duty, but doing favors for others can be useful later on. How about this—drive away about #3 monsters from the road?

Ensuring road safety
The invisible force
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_merchant_in:
Are you knowledgeable about investing? Me? Not at all—I invest purely by intuition. So, for reference, go make #2 times investments wherever you think is best.
If there’s a business you want to grow, investment is the way to go. The guild is currently encouraging active investment as part of its growth week. Just #2 times, why don’t you give it a try?
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_merchant_sa:
How’s business at your shop? I’ve lost my grasp on what the next trend will be. Sell goods worth #2 orens at your store—anything will do. I’ll use it as a reference for my own purchasing.
The Merchants’ Guild is currently conducting evaluations of member shops. Would you like to take part? I can’t reveal exactly what we’re assessing, but don’t worry—you just need to make #2 orens’ worth of sales at your store. Simple enough, right?
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_merchant_sh:
I’ve heard that you’re running a settlement. I’m actually interested myself. I’d like to know how you secure funding—show me how you ship out about #2 orens. Don’t worry, I’ll observe secretly from where you can’t see me.
It’s important for a merchant to know the producers well. So, you ship goods from your settlement too? Then try shipping out about #2 orens’ worth.

Model of pioneer
Visit the producers
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_thief_crim_:
There’s a crim processing plant nearby, but lately the workers there have been smoking the crim they processed without permission and have become completely useless. They’re now hiring temporary workers—would you like to give it a try? The quota this time is #2.
I have a very simple job for you. It’s to grind dried crim into powder using a stone mill. If you deliver #2 of it, I’ll pay you #1. Sounds like a good deal, doesn’t it?
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_thief_deliv:
Deliver this #2 to the [qClient] in #3 without saying a word. Do not, under any circumstances, lose it. Let me repeat: I will not answer any questions about the item.
Something came up and I urgently need this #2 delivered to [qClient] who lives in #3. Just get it to him — I don't care how you do it.

An “ordinary” delivery
Delivery with a story
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_thief_dunge:
There’s a powerful #2 in a certain Nefia. I want you to retrieve it — I don’t mind if you “fail or lose it along the way,” but I will hold you accountable.
I want this to be a secret between you and me, but I’ve learned that a magical #2 is in a Nefia. Keep your promise and bring the #2 back from the Nefia, and I’ll reward you.

The most important thing
Secret treasure hunt
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_thief_guild:
This is a problem. I'm about to have an important meeting with a certain [qClient], but the Warriors' Guild has sniffed it out. I plan to move the location, but we can't have them interfering there as well. #aka, stay at the guild and act as a decoy to buy time.
Apparently, whoever sent them, the Warriors' Guild is going to storm in soon. We're just keeping a low profile and yet they're such boors. #aka, throw every last one of them out.
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_thief_liais:
Deliver this #2 to the [qClient] in #3 without saying a word. Do not, under any circumstances, lose it. Let me repeat: I will not answer any questions about the item.
Something came up and I urgently need this #2 delivered to [qClient] who lives in #3. Just get it to him — I don't care how you do it.

An “ordinary” delivery
Delivery with a story

I recently took on a theft job, but I made a bit of a mistake. The guards are keeping an eye on me, so I can't make a move for a while. Could you deliver this #2 to [qClient] in #3? They'll take care of the rest. 
I have a simple job for you. All you have to do is deliver this #2 to [qClient] in #3. It's technically smuggling, so there might be some people after you, but I'm sure you'll have no trouble handling it, right?

One of the local gang members has recently joined our guild. However, it seems there was a serious falling-out when they left their old crew, and it's no longer safe for them to stay here. I want to have them lay low in #3 until things calm down. Could you escort them there? 
Someone I had infiltrate a noble's estate managed to obtain some valuable information. However, they've been pursued by the noble's forces, and I'm afraid the information will be lost before we can make use of it. Could you escort them safely to #3?

I always get nervous before a theft. How about you? If you're confident, prove it by selling #2 orens worth of stolen goods.
It's much easier to make a mark than to look for one. For now, sell #2 orens worth of stolen goods at your shop. I'll extort the fool who bought them. A nice little payday for both of us, right?

Challenge of theft
Seed of blackmail
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_thief_shopp:
I always get nervous before a theft. How about you? If you're confident, prove it by selling #2 orens worth of stolen goods.
It's much easier to make a mark than to look for one. For now, sell #2 orens worth of stolen goods at your shop. I'll extort the fool who bought them. A nice little payday for both of us, right?

Challenge of theft
Seed of blackmail
SourceQuest.byakko_mod_guild_thief_slavi:
Do you have any spare hands? Actually we need a few people. Pick out some suitable ones and sell them for about #2 orens. Preferably somewhat dumb or obedient, if possible.
You saw the guild’s front shop, right? Prepare a few people to work there — roughly for #2 orens. Well-trained ones are fine, and completely untrained ones are fine too. Either way they’ll come in handy.
